title: oxytropis hailarensis f. hailarensis
intro: Oxytropis hailarensis f. hailarensis is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau in China. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxytropis hailarensis f. hailarensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional Chinese medicine formulas for its medicinal properties.
